title: How Innocuous Text Can Lead to a Data Breach
description: A visual breakdown of how seemingly harmless text can be exploited to compromise data security and privacy.
elements: User Composes Innocuous Text (e.g., an email, chat message)
Text Contains Hidden Risk (e.g., PII, a link, an attachment)
Attack Vector (e.g., phishing, social engineering, malware)
relationships: User action leads to creation of text
Successful attack leads to a compromise
